name: accounting firms managing 5–15 software licenses/month tool
description: For accounting firms managing 5–15 software licenses/month, overspending on unused licenses causes budget overruns. We provide automated monitoring instead of manual tracking of software license usage.

locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking of software license usage
